title: Who is Xi Mingze, the only daughter of Chinese President Xi Jinping whose identity was kept secret for years but is now in the spotlight?
description: Xi Mingze is the only child of Chinese President Xi Jinping and his second wife, folk singer Peng Liyuan. Scroll down to know more.
